instruction: Route the citizen's request to the correct government department.
baseline_prompt: You are a citizen-services router. Route the citizen's request to the correct government department. Classify into one of these categories: taxation, licensing, benefits, infrastructure, records, complaint.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: We recently sold our home and I'm not sure how to report the capital gains. We lived there for eight years, so I think there might be an exclusion, but I need clarification on the forms.
My construction company is starting a new project and we need to obtain the proper building permits. What's the process for getting approval to begin work on a commercial property?
I'm a single mother with three children and my income isn't enough to cover childcare and basic necessities. Where do I apply for financial help with food and housing?
Our entire block has been without storm drain maintenance for years and now the drains are completely clogged. Every time it rains heavily, the street floods and water backs up into our yards.
Is it possible to obtain a certified death certificate for my uncle? He passed away here two years ago and the insurance company requires official documentation to process the claim.

The staff member at the front desk yesterday was extremely rude and dismissive when I asked for help. She rolled her eyes and acted like I was bothering her. This kind of attitude has no place in public service.
I received a notice saying I owe additional money from three years ago, but I don't understand the explanation. Can I schedule an appointment to review my account and discuss payment options?
I'm opening a home-based daycare and want to make sure I have all the necessary certifications and approvals before I start accepting children. Can you guide me through the requirements?
My disability prevents me from working full-time and I can barely afford my medical expenses. Can someone tell me if there are any support programs I might qualify for to help with living costs?
The streetlight at the corner of 5th and Main has been out for three weeks now, making it very dark and dangerous for pedestrians crossing at night. Can someone come repair or replace it?
Could you help me get a copy of the property deed for my house? The bank is asking for it to refinance my mortgage and I can't find my copy anywhere.

The online portal is terrible - it crashes constantly, forms don't save properly, and the interface is confusing. For a government service in 2024, this is embarrassing. You need to invest in better technology.
I'm 72 years old and confused about whether I need to take required minimum distributions from my retirement account this year and how that affects what I owe.
Our restaurant wants to add outdoor seating on the sidewalk this summer. What kind of approval do we need from the city to set up tables outside our storefront?

I lost my job last month and I'm struggling to make ends meet. I need to know what kind of financial assistance programs are available to help me cover rent and groceries while I search for new employment.

test.query: The sidewalk in front of 342 Elm Street is completely cracked and uneven, creating a tripping hazard. My elderly neighbor fell there last week. When can the city fix this?
I need a certified copy of my daughter's birth certificate for her passport application. She was born in this county three years ago and I've lost the original document.

I've been trying to reach someone in your office for three weeks now and nobody ever picks up the phone. This is absolutely unacceptable service for taxpayers who fund your salaries. The voicemail box is always full and emails go unanswered.
My small business needs to set up payroll withholding for two new employees. What forms do I need to submit and what are the deadlines for remitting the withheld amounts?
We're planning to hold a large community festival in the park with vendors and live music. What kind of authorization do we need from the city to host this event?
I'm currently receiving some form of monthly support but I'm not sure if the amount is correct based on my family size. Who can I contact to review my case and check if I should be getting more?

There's a huge pothole on Maple Street near the intersection with Oak Avenue that's been getting worse over the past month. It's causing damage to vehicles and is becoming a safety hazard for drivers in our neighborhood.
I need to request a certificate showing when and where my parents were married. They got married in this jurisdiction in 1992 and I need it for immigration purposes.

I'm very disappointed with how my case was handled. The information I was given over the phone contradicted what was written on your website, and now I've wasted time and money following incorrect guidance.
I'm a freelance graphic designer and this is my first year working for myself. Can someone explain what quarterly estimated payments are and how I'm supposed to calculate them?
I need to renew my food handler's certificate before it expires next month. Can you tell me what documents I need and where to submit the application?
I need to update my information because my living situation has changed - I now have custody of my nephew and I think this might affect the support payments I receive for my household.
I'm calling about the bridge on County Road 12 that crosses Miller Creek. The guardrail is damaged and there are visible cracks in the concrete surface. This needs inspection and repair.
I'm researching my family history and would like to access historical birth and death records for my grandfather who lived in this area between 1940 and 1985.
Nobody seems to know what they're doing. I've spoken to five different people and gotten five different answers. There's clearly a lack of training and communication within your organization.

I need help understanding why my refund from last year hasn't arrived yet. I filed electronically in March and was told it would take 6-8 weeks, but it's been almost four months now and I haven't received anything.
My driver's credential expired last week and I need to get it renewed as soon as possible. What are my options for getting this done quickly?
My elderly mother lives alone on a very small pension and struggles to pay for heating in winter. Are there any supplementary assistance programs that could help her with utility bills?
